name: Academy Match Result
description: Match result graphic for Demo Brand's youth teams (U-19, U-17, U-15). Keeps fans informed on academy performance and results.
guidelines: Similar layout to the first-team full-time template but with the green academy accent color and the academy badge. Age group label must be prominently displayed so fans immediately know which team. Include goal scorers. Keep the design consistent with first-team templates to maintain brand unity. Published within 30 minutes of the final whistle.
